description: Zscaler Integrations MCP Server connects AI agents to Zscaler products through the Model Context Protocol. It lets agents use Zscaler toolsets spanning products such as ZIA, ZPA, ZDX, ZCC, and related services.
summary: Zscaler MCP Server exposes an installable Python/Docker CLI and an MCP server supporting `stdio`, `sse`, and `streamable-http`; HTTP MCP can be protected by API key, JWT, Zscaler OneAPI credentials, or OAuth via OIDCProxy.
